description_long: This is a robust, double-edged axe featuring a long, cylindrical handle with a textured grip at the base for secure handling. The handle appears to be made of metal, with a slightly flared end and subtle ridges for ergonomic support. The axe head is broad and angular, with a single large, curved blade on one side and a pointed spike on the opposite end, giving it a versatile, tactical appearance. The blade is metallic and has a matte, slightly reflective finish, while the handle is a lighter gray with a more matte texture. The mounting of the blade to the handle is seamless, suggesting a modern, integrated construction. No visible markings, engravings, or labels are present on the axe.
description: A double-edged, metallic axe with a broad, curved blade and a long, textured handle, featuring a modern, seamless design.
description_view_0: The axe is seen from the spike end, showing the pointed tip and the cylindrical handle with its textured grip.
description_view_1: The broad, curved blade is fully visible, attached to the handle, with the blade's edge and angular profile clearly shown.
description_view_2: The axe is viewed from the opposite spike end, mirroring view 0, with the pointed tip and handle details visible.
description_view_3: The opposite side of the blade is shown, highlighting the blade's curvature and the seamless attachment to the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Long, straight, cylindrical metal handle with a textured, ribbed grip at the base; appears ergonomic and non-slip.
attribute_blade_design: Single broad, curved blade with a sharp edge and a pointed spike on the opposite side; no beard or decorative features.
attribute_mounting_style: Modern, seamless integrated mounting with no visible pins or wedges.
